requirement_topic.en: BBS / PUC / BEL Market-Access and Project Scope
requirement_topic.zh: BBS / PUC / BEL市场准入和项目范围
requirement_topic.zht: BBS / PUC / BEL市場准入和項目範圍

summary.en: The Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) is the national standards body, the Public Utilities Commission (PUC) regulates public utilities including electricity, and Belize Electricity Limited (BEL) is the national electricity utility. No single official public EVSE whole-unit mandatory certification route was confirmed for all imported EV chargers as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should therefore verify the product HS code, electrical equipment conformity route, labelling, importer obligations, radio module status, and site-specific BEL connection requirements before shipment. For grid-connected installations, BEL project coordination and PUC-regulated electricity service context are separate from product import conformity.
summary.zh: Belize Bureau of Standards（BBS）是伯利兹国家标准机构，Public Utilities Commission（PUC）监管包括电力在内的公用事业，Belize Electricity Limited（BEL）是国家电力公用事业公司。截至2026年6月14日，未能确认适用于所有进口电动汽车充电桩整机的单一官方公开强制认证路径。因此，出口商应在出货前核实产品HS编码、电气设备合格评定路径、标签、进口商义务、无线模块状态和具体场地BEL接入要求。对于并网安装，BEL项目协调和PUC监管下的电力服务背景与产品进口合格评定相互独立。
summary.zht: Belize Bureau of Standards（BBS）是貝里斯國家標準機構，Public Utilities Commission（PUC）監管包括電力在內的公用事業，Belize Electricity Limited（BEL）是國家電力公用事業公司。截至2026年6月14日，未能確認適用於所有進口電動汽車充電樁整機的單一官方公開強制認證路徑。因此，出口商應在出貨前核實產品HS編碼、電氣設備合格評定路徑、標籤、進口商義務、無線模組狀態和具體場地BEL接入要求。對於併網安裝，BEL項目協調和PUC監管下的電力服務背景與產品進口合格評定相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) standards and conformity-assessment context
Public Utilities Commission (PUC) electricity utility regulation
Belize Electricity Limited (BEL) service connection and project requirements
Belize Customs and importer HS-code review where applicable
Project-specific tender, site-owner, insurer, or charge-point-operator requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, and GB/T 27930 DC communication, with China CCC applying where the product falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T evidence can support engineering review, but it does not establish Belize market access, BBS acceptance, BEL energization approval, or compliance with J1772 / CCS1 and 60 Hz requirements.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流通信准备文件；如产品属于CCC适用范围，则适用中国强制认证。中国CCC或GB/T证据可支持工程审查，但不能证明伯利兹市场准入、BBS接受、BEL送电批准或符合J1772 / CCS1及60 Hz要求。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流通訊準備文件；如產品屬於CCC適用範圍，則適用中國強制認證。中國CCC或GB/T證據可支持工程審查，但不能證明貝里斯市場准入、BBS接受、BEL送電批准或符合J1772 / CCS1及60 Hz要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map the Belize importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage and frequency, connector configuration, radio modules, labelling, user manuals, safety reports, EMC reports, and BEL project requirements before claiming Belize readiness. China domestic documentation should be converted into a Belize package that explicitly addresses BBS conformity questions, PUC/BEL electricity context, 60 Hz input validation, SAE J1772 / CCS1 hardware, and US-direction safety evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称伯利兹就绪前，应明确伯利兹进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压和频率、接口配置、无线模块、标签、用户手册、安全报告、EMC报告和BEL项目要求。中国国内文件应转换为明确回应BBS合格评定问题、PUC/BEL电力背景、60 Hz输入验证、SAE J1772 / CCS1硬件和美国方向安全证据的伯利兹资料包。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱貝里斯就緒前，應明確貝里斯進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓和頻率、接口配置、無線模組、標籤、用戶手冊、安全報告、EMC報告和BEL項目要求。中國國內文件應轉換為明確回應BBS合格評定問題、PUC/BEL電力背景、60 Hz輸入驗證、SAE J1772 / CCS1硬體和美國方向安全證據的貝里斯資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact BBS conformity and import route should be verified for the specific HS code and product; BEL project coordination is mandatory for grid-connected installations; PUC-regulated electricity context applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T or CCC evidence is not a Belize market-access or BEL energization substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Belize market access from China CCC or GB/T reports. Verify the BBS/import route, PUC/BEL project context, 60 Hz grid fit, SAE J1772 / CCS1 connector design, and safety/EMC evidence for the specific product and site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足伯利兹市场准入。应针对具体产品和场地核实BBS/进口路径、PUC/BEL项目背景、60 Hz电网适配、SAE J1772 / CCS1接口设计以及安全/EMC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足貝里斯市場准入。應針對具體產品和場地核實BBS/進口路徑、PUC/BEL項目背景、60 Hz電網適配、SAE J1772 / CCS1接口設計以及安全/EMC證據。

requirement_topic.en: Belize EV Market Context — Nascent Demand and Americas Equipment Fit
requirement_topic.zh: 伯利兹电动汽车市场背景——早期需求和美洲设备适配
requirement_topic.zht: 貝里斯電動汽車市場背景——早期需求和美洲設備適配

summary.en: Belize's EV charger market should be treated as nascent and project-led. Early deployments are likely to depend on private fleets, tourism sites, hotels, public-sector pilots, and utility or donor-backed infrastructure rather than a mature national charging code. This creates commercial opportunity but increases the need to confirm each tender's technical assumptions. Because Belize uses 60 Hz, US-heritage electrical practice, and regional links to Mexico and Central America, equipment fit should start from Americas voltage, connector, safety, and EMC assumptions: 110/220 V or 120/240 V class input, SAE J1772 AC, CCS1 DC, UL-direction safety, and 60 Hz validation.
summary.zh: 伯利兹电动汽车充电桩市场应视为处于早期且由项目驱动。早期部署较可能依赖私营车队、旅游场地、酒店、公共部门试点，以及公用事业或捐助方支持的基础设施，而非成熟的全国充电规范。这创造了商业机会，但也提高了逐项确认招标技术假设的必要性。由于伯利兹采用60 Hz、美国体系电气实践，并与墨西哥和中美洲存在区域联系，设备适配应从美洲电压、接口、安全和EMC假设出发：110/220 V或120/240 V等级输入、SAE J1772交流、CCS1直流、UL方向安全和60 Hz验证。
summary.zht: 貝里斯電動汽車充電樁市場應視為處於早期且由項目驅動。早期部署較可能依賴私營車隊、旅遊場地、酒店、公共部門試點，以及公用事業或捐助方支持的基礎設施，而非成熟的全國充電規範。這創造了商業機會，但也提高了逐項確認招標技術假設的必要性。由於貝里斯採用60 Hz、美國體系電氣實務，並與墨西哥和中美洲存在區域聯繫，設備適配應從美洲電壓、接口、安全和EMC假設出發：110/220 V或120/240 V等級輸入、SAE J1772交流、CCS1直流、UL方向安全和60 Hz驗證。

standards_or_laws: Belize national EV market and infrastructure policy context
BEL grid service and capacity coordination
PUC electricity-sector oversight
SAE J1772 / CCS1 Americas connector ecosystem
UL 2202 / UL 2594 US-direction EVSE safety practice

summary.en: China's domestic EV infrastructure market is mature and standardized around GB/T connectors, GB/T 27930 DC communication, 220/380 V at 50 Hz, and Chinese grid-operator practices. Those high-volume domestic assumptions do not transfer automatically to Belize's small, 60 Hz, US-heritage market. Export models intended for Belize should be configured as Americas-market EVSE rather than China GB/T EVSE with paperwork changes.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车基础设施市场成熟，并围绕GB/T接口、GB/T 27930直流通信、220/380 V 50 Hz以及中国电网运营商实践标准化。这些大规模国内假设不会自动转移至伯利兹这个规模较小、60 Hz、美国体系市场。面向伯利兹的出口型号应配置为美洲市场EVSE，而不是仅更换文件的中国GB/T EVSE。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車基礎設施市場成熟，並圍繞GB/T接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊、220/380 V 50 Hz以及中國電網運營商實務標準化。這些大規模國內假設不會自動轉移至貝里斯這個規模較小、60 Hz、美國體系市場。面向貝里斯的出口型號應配置為美洲市場EVSE，而不是僅更換文件的中國GB/T EVSE。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)

gap.en: Belize's market opportunity does not reduce technical validation. Chinese exporters should budget lead time for 60 Hz testing, 110/220 V or 120/240 V configuration, SAE J1772 / CCS1 hardware, UL-direction safety review, FCC / IEC EMC evidence, English documentation, corrosion and humidity suitability, and direct confirmation of BEL site requirements before procurement commitments.
gap.zh: 伯利兹市场机会并不降低技术验证要求。中国出口商应为60 Hz测试、110/220 V或120/240 V配置、SAE J1772 / CCS1硬件、UL方向安全审查、FCC / IEC EMC证据、英文文件、耐腐蚀和湿热适用性，以及采购承诺前直接确认BEL场地要求预留交期。
gap.zht: 貝里斯市場機會並不降低技術驗證要求。中國出口商應為60 Hz測試、110/220 V或120/240 V配置、SAE J1772 / CCS1硬體、UL方向安全審查、FCC / IEC EMC證據、英文文件、耐腐蝕和濕熱適用性，以及採購承諾前直接確認BEL場地要求預留交期。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; project, BBS, PUC, BEL, importer, and site-owner requirements remain separately applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV market scale does not affect Belize conformity or grid obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Belize is an early EV infrastructure market, but the equipment assumptions are not vague: use Americas-market 60 Hz, SAE J1772 / CCS1, and UL-direction safety expectations unless the project states otherwise. GB/T EVSE needs engineering conversion, not just relabelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 伯利兹是早期电动汽车基础设施市场，但设备假设并不模糊：除非项目另有说明，应采用美洲市场60 Hz、SAE J1772 / CCS1和UL方向安全预期。GB/T EVSE需要工程转换，而不是仅重新贴标。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 貝里斯是早期電動汽車基礎設施市場，但設備假設並不模糊：除非項目另有說明，應採用美洲市場60 Hz、SAE J1772 / CCS1和UL方向安全預期。GB/T EVSE需要工程轉換，而不是僅重新貼標。
